AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于SegEarth-OV等SOTA方法，开放词汇分割任务提升2.80%，目标提取任务提升6.13%。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模空间单元间语义依赖关系，ConInfer显著提升了复杂遥感环境下的分割鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: Unbiased Model Prediction Without Using Protected Attribute Information
summary: The problem of bias persists in the deep learning community as models continue to provide disparate performance across different demographic subgroups. Therefore, several algorithms have been proposed to improve the fairness of deep models. However, a majority of these algorithms utilize the protected attribute information for bias mitigation, which severely limits their application in real-world scenarios. To address this concern, we have proposed a novel algorithm, termed as \textbf{Non-Protected Attribute-based Debiasing (NPAD)} algorithm for bias mitigation, that does not require the protected attribute information. The proposed NPAD algorithm utilizes the auxiliary information provided by the non-protected attributes to optimize the model for bias mitigation. Further, two different loss functions, \textbf{Debiasing via Attribute Cluster Loss (DACL)} and \textbf{Filter Redundancy Loss (FRL)} have been proposed to optimize the model for fairness goals. Multiple experiments are performed on the LFWA and CelebA datasets for facial attribute prediction, and a significant reduction in bias across different gender and age subgroups is observed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需使用受保护属性信息的深度学习模型去偏算法，以解决模型在不同人口子群体中的性能差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏算法依赖受保护属性（如性别、种族）信息，这在实际应用中存在隐私和数据可用性限制，因此需要开发无需此类信息的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出非受保护属性去偏（NPAD）算法，利用非受保护属性的辅助信息，并设计两种损失函数：属性聚类去偏损失（DACL）和过滤冗余损失（FRL）以优化公平性目标。
AI.result: 在LFWA和CelebA数据集上的实验表明，该方法在性别和年龄子群体中显著降低了模型预测偏差。
AI.conclusion: NPAD算法通过非受保护属性实现有效去偏，为实际场景中无法获取受保护属性信息的应用提供了可行解决方案。

title: Audio Hallucination Attacks: Probing the Reliability of Large Audio Language Models
summary: Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) achieve strong performance on audio-language tasks; however, their reliability in real-world settings remains underexplored. We introduce Audio Hallucination Attacks (AHA), an attack suite called AHA-Eval, comprising 6.5K QA pairs designed to test whether LALMs genuinely ground their responses in the audio input. AHA targets two attack surfaces: (i) query-based attacks, which exploit question structure to induce hallucinations about absent sounds, and (ii) audio-based attacks, which inject synthetic speech describing non-existent events into the audio stream. Evaluating state-of-the-art LALMs, including Audio Flamingo 3 and Gemini 3 Pro, we observe high attack success rates of 95.35% and 79.65%, respectively, revealing a reliability gap that is hidden by standard benchmark performance. To mitigate this, we propose a 120K QA post-alignment dataset, AHA-Guard, which successfully reduces attack success rates by up to 49%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出音频幻觉攻击（AHA）方法，测试大音频语言模型（LALMs）的可靠性，并开发AHA-Guard数据集以降低攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 尽管大音频语言模型在音频-语言任务中表现优异，但其在现实场景中的可靠性尚未得到充分研究，标准基准测试可能掩盖了潜在问题。
AI.method: 通过设计包含6500个问答对的AHA-Eval攻击套件，针对查询结构和音频注入两种攻击面进行测试，并构建12万问答的AHA-Guard数据集进行防御。
AI.result: 实验显示，对Audio Flamingo 3和Gemini 3 Pro的攻击成功率分别高达95.35%和79.65%，而AHA-Guard数据集将攻击成功率降低最多49%。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了大音频语言模型在真实场景中的可靠性问题，并提出了有效的防御方法，为模型安全性和鲁棒性提供了新视角。

title: Grokking From Abstraction to Intelligence
comment: 22page and 5 figures,In this paper, we analyze the grokking phenomenon from the perspective of Singular Learning Theory (SLT). This work is currently under review for ICML 2026
summary: Grokking in modular arithmetic has established itself as the quintessential fruit fly experiment, serving as a critical domain for investigating the mechanistic origins of model generalization. Despite its significance, existing research remains narrowly focused on specific local circuits or optimization tuning, largely overlooking the global structural evolution that fundamentally drives this phenomenon. We propose that grokking originates from a spontaneous simplification of internal model structures governed by the principle of parsimony. We integrate causal, spectral, and algorithmic complexity measures alongside Singular Learning Theory to reveal that the transition from memorization to generalization corresponds to the physical collapse of redundant manifolds and deep information compression, offering a novel perspective for understanding the mechanisms of model overfitting and generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究模型从记忆到泛化的转变机制，提出这种转变源于内部结构的自发简化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注局部电路或优化调参，忽视了全局结构演化对模型泛化能力的根本影响。
AI.method: 结合因果分析、谱分析、算法复杂度度量及奇异学习理论，揭示模型结构演化规律。
AI.result: 发现记忆到泛化的转变对应冗余流形坍缩和深度信息压缩过程。
AI.conclusion: 模型泛化能力源于结构简化驱动的物理坍缩，为理解过拟合与泛化机制提供新视角。

title: Monodense Deep Neural Model for Determining Item Price Elasticity
comment: Accepted at AAIML 2026 (International Conference on Advances in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning). Copyright 2026 IEEE. 6 pages, 4 figures
summary: Item Price Elasticity is used to quantify the responsiveness of consumer demand to changes in item prices, enabling businesses to create pricing strategies and optimize revenue management. Sectors such as store retail, e-commerce, and consumer goods rely on elasticity information derived from historical sales and pricing data. This elasticity provides an understanding of purchasing behavior across different items, consumer discount sensitivity, and demand elastic departments. This information is particularly valuable for competitive markets and resource-constrained businesses decision making which aims to maximize profitability and market share. Price elasticity also uncovers historical shifts in consumer responsiveness over time. In this paper, we model item-level price elasticity using large-scale transactional datasets, by proposing a novel elasticity estimation framework which has the capability to work in an absence of treatment control setting. We test this framework by using Machine learning based algorithms listed below, including our newly proposed Monodense deep neural network. (1) Monodense-DL network -- Hybrid neural network architecture combining embedding, dense, and Monodense layers (2) DML -- Double machine learning setting using regression models (3) LGBM -- Light Gradient Boosting Model We evaluate our model on multi-category retail data spanning millions of transactions using a back testing framework. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed neural network model within the framework compared to other prevalent ML based methods listed above.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大规模交易数据的新型价格弹性估计框架，通过Monodense深度神经网络等方法建模商品层级的价格弹性。
AI.motivation: 价格弹性信息对零售、电商等行业的定价策略优化至关重要，但传统方法在缺乏对照实验的现实场景中难以准确估计。本文旨在提出一种无需对照组的弹性估计框架以提升商业决策效果。
AI.method: 构建包含Monodense-DL（嵌入层+密集层+Monodense层的混合架构）、DML（双重机器学习回归模型）和LGBM（梯度提升模型）的对比实验体系，并基于多品类零售数据进行回测验证。
AI.result: 实验表明Monodense-DL模型在多品类零售数据集上的价格弹性预测效果显著优于DML和LGBM等传统机器学习方法。
AI.conclusion: Monodense深度神经网络框架能有效捕捉商品价格弹性特征，为资源受限企业的动态定价策略优化提供了可行的技术方案。

title: Omni-NegCLIP: Enhancing CLIP with Front-Layer Contrastive Fine-Tuning for Comprehensive Negation Understanding
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities across a wide range of multimodal tasks. However, recent studies have shown that VLMs, such as CLIP, perform poorly in understanding negation expressions, which are common in natural language. In this work, we propose Omni-NegCLIP, a fine-tuned CLIP model that improves CLIP's understanding of two types of negation, namely presence-based negation and absence-based negation, which correspond to negated expressions of objects that are actually present in an image and those that may plausibly exist in an image but are in fact absent, respectively, by modifying CLIP's original InfoNCE contrastive loss. Specifically, we design a presence-based contrastive objective that pulls image embeddings closer to their original caption embeddings while pushing them away from the corresponding presence-based negated caption embeddings, and an absence-based contrastive objective that aligns image embeddings with both original and absence-based negated caption embeddings while maintaining a semantic distinction between the two text embeddings. Based on our observation that the front transformer layers of CLIP text encoder have stronger learning ability for negated text than the later layers, we fine-tune the front transformer layers of the CLIP text encoder at each training step using the combined contrastive objective. Experimental results show that, compared with pretrained CLIP, Omni-NegCLIP improves performance on presence-based negation and absence-based negation tasks by up to 52.65% and 12.50%, respectively, without sacrificing general capability in image-text retrieval and even improving it by up to 19.62%. Compared with prior works, Omni-NegCLIP demonstrates a more comprehensive ability to understand multiple types of negation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Omni-NegCLIP模型，通过改进CLIP的对比损失函数和微调前层Transformer，提升视觉-语言模型对否定表达的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）在处理否定表达（如'图像中没有猫'）时表现较差，而否定表达在自然语言中普遍存在，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 设计两种对比目标：1）拉近图像嵌入与原始描述嵌入，推远与存在否定描述嵌入；2）对齐图像嵌入与原始及缺失否定描述嵌入但保持语义区分。微调CLIP文本编码器的前层Transformer以增强否定文本学习能力。
AI.result: 在存在否定和缺失否定任务上分别提升52.65%和12.50%，同时图像-文本检索性能提升19.62%，且未损害通用能力。
AI.conclusion: Omni-NegCLIP通过分层微调和对比目标设计，有效提升了CLIP对多类否定表达的理解，验证了其方法在保持通用性的同时优化特定任务性能的有效性。

title: SuperGrasp: Single-View Object Grasping via Superquadric Similarity Matching, Evaluation, and Refinement
summary: Robotic grasping from single-view observations remains a critical challenge in manipulation. Existing methods still struggle to generate stable and valid grasp poses when confronted with incomplete geometric information. To address these limitations, we propose SuperGrasp, a novel two-stage framework for single-view grasping with parallel-jaw grippers that decomposes the grasping process into initial grasp pose generation and subsequent grasp evaluation and refinement. In the first stage, we introduce a Similarity Matching Module that efficiently retrieves grasp candidates by matching the input single-view point cloud with a pre-computed primitive dataset based on superquadric coefficients. In the second stage, we propose E-RNet, an end-to-end network that expands the graspaware region and takes the initial grasp closure region as a local anchor region, enabling more accurate and reliable evaluation and refinement of grasp candidates. To enhance generalization, we construct a primitive dataset containing 1.5k primitives for similarity matching and collect a large-scale point cloud dataset with 100k stable grasp labels from 124 objects for network training. Extensive experiments in both simulation and realworld environments demonstrate that our method achieves stable grasping performance and strong generalization across varying scenes and novel objects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SuperGrasp框架，通过超二次曲面相似性匹配、评估和优化，解决单视角下机器人抓取不完整几何信息的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在面对不完整几何信息时难以生成稳定有效的抓取姿态，需改进单视角抓取的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段通过超二次曲面系数匹配生成初始抓取候选；第二阶段使用E-RNet网络优化抓取区域，结合局部锚定区域提升精度。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中均表现出稳定抓取性能，对不同场景和新物体具有强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SuperGrasp通过分解抓取流程并结合数据集优化，有效提升了单视角抓取的准确性和适应性。

title: Scaling the Long Video Understanding of Multimodal Large Language Models via Visual Memory Mechanism
summary: Long video understanding is a key challenge that plagues the advancement of \emph{Multimodal Large language Models} (MLLMs). In this paper, we study this problem from the perspective of visual memory mechanism, and proposed a novel and training-free approach, termed \emph{Flexible Memory} (\textbf{FlexMem}). In principle, FlexMem aims to mimic human behavior of video watching, \emph{i.e.}, continually watching video content and recalling the most relevant memory fragments to answer the question. In this way, FlexMem can help MLLMs achieve video understanding of infinite lengths, unlike previous methods that process all video information at once and have input upper-limit. Concretely, FlexMem first consider the visual KV caches as the memory sources, and realize the effective memory transfer and writing via a dual-pathway compression design. Afterwards, FlexMem also explores different memory reading strategies for the diverse video understanding tasks, including the popular streaming one. To validate FlexMem, we apply it to two popular video-MLLMs, and conduct extensive experiments on five long video and one streaming video task. The experimental results show that on \textbf{a single 3090 GPU}, our FlexMem can achieve obvious improvements than existing efficient video understanding methods and process more than \textbf{1k frames}, which also helps the base MLLMs achieve comparable or even better performance than SOTA MLLMs on some benchmarks, \emph{e.g.} , GPT-4o and Gemini-1.5 Pro.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FlexMem的视觉记忆机制，用于解决多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在长视频理解中的输入长度限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs处理长视频时需一次性处理所有信息，存在输入上限限制，难以模拟人类观看视频时的连续记忆与回忆行为。
AI.method: FlexMem通过双路径压缩设计实现视觉KV缓存的有效记忆存储与传输，并探索多样化的记忆读取策略（如流式处理），无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在单块3090 GPU上，FlexMem处理超1000帧视频时显著优于现有高效方法，使基础MLLMs在部分基准测试中达到甚至超越GPT-4o和Gemini-1.5 Pro的性能。
AI.conclusion: FlexMem通过模拟人类记忆机制，有效突破了MLLMs长视频理解的输入长度限制，为无限长视频处理提供了训练免费的解决方案。

title: MemRerank: Preference Memory for Personalized Product Reranking
summary: LLM-based shopping agents increasingly rely on long purchase histories and multi-turn interactions for personalization, yet naively appending raw history to prompts is often ineffective due to noise, length, and relevance mismatch. We propose MemRerank, a preference memory framework that distills user purchase history into concise, query-independent signals for personalized product reranking. To study this problem, we build an end-to-end benchmark and evaluation framework centered on an LLM-based \textbf{1-in-5} selection task, which measures both memory quality and downstream reranking utility. We further train the memory extractor with reinforcement learning (RL), using downstream reranking performance as supervision. Experiments with two LLM-based rerankers show that MemRerank consistently outperforms no-memory, raw-history, and off-the-shelf memory baselines, yielding up to \textbf{+10.61} absolute points in 1-in-5 accuracy. These results suggest that explicit preference memory is a practical and effective building block for personalization in agentic e-commerce systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemRerank框架，通过提炼用户购买历史中的偏好记忆信号，解决基于LLM的购物代理在个性化产品重排序中的效果问题。
AI.motivation: 直接将原始购买历史附加到LLM提示中存在噪声干扰、长度限制和相关性不匹配问题，导致个性化效果不佳。
AI.method: 构建端到端评估框架，设计1-in-5选择任务衡量记忆质量；通过强化学习训练记忆提取器，将用户历史转化为简洁的查询无关信号。
AI.result: 实验显示MemRerank在1-in-5任务上比无记忆、原始历史和现成记忆基线提升10.61个百分点绝对值。
AI.conclusion: 显式偏好记忆机制是代理电商系统实现个性化重排序的有效实用方案。

title: Monocular Building Height Estimation from PhiSat-2 Imagery: Dataset and Method
summary: Monocular building height estimation from optical imagery is important for urban morphology characterization but remains challenging due to ambiguous height cues, large inter-city variations in building morphology, and the long-tailed distribution of building heights. PhiSat-2 is a promising open-access data source for this task because of its global coverage, 4.75 m spatial resolution, and seven-band spectral observations, yet its potential has not been systematically evaluated. To address this gap, we construct a PhiSat-2-Height dataset (PHDataset) and propose a Two-Stream Ordinal Network (TSONet). PHDataset contains 9,475 co-registered image-label patch pairs from 26 cities worldwide. TSONet jointly models footprint segmentation and height estimation, and introduces a Cross-Stream Exchange Module (CSEM) and a Feature-Enhanced Bin Refinement (FEBR) module for footprint-aware feature interaction and ordinal height refinement. Experiments on PHDataset show that TSONet achieves the best overall performance, reducing MAE and RMSE by 13.2% and 9.7%, and improving IoU and F1-score by 14.0% and 10.1% over the strongest competing results. Ablation studies further verify the effectiveness of CSEM, FEBR, and the joint use of ordinal regression and footprint assistance. Additional analyses indicate that PhiSat-2 benefits monocular building height estimation through its balanced combination of building-relevant spatial detail and multispectral observations. Overall, this study confirms the potential of PhiSat-2 for monocular building height estimation and provides a dedicated dataset and an effective method for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于PhiSat-2影像的单目建筑高度估计方法，并构建了相应的PHDataset数据集。
AI.motivation: 由于高度线索模糊、城市间建筑形态差异大及高度分布不均，单目建筑高度估计具有挑战性。PhiSat-2虽具备高分辨率和多光谱观测能力，但其潜力尚未被系统评估。
AI.method: 提出双流序数网络（TSONet），结合足迹分割与高度估计，引入跨流交换模块（CSEM）和特征增强的分箱细化模块（FEBR）以优化特征交互和序数高度精炼。
AI.result: 在PHDataset上，TSONet在MAE、RMSE、IoU和F1-score指标上分别优于现有方法13.2%、9.7%、14.0%和10.1%。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了PhiSat-2在单目建筑高度估计中的潜力，并为未来研究提供了专用数据集和有效方法。

title: Long-Reach Robotic Cleaning for Lunar Solar Arrays
comment: Extended abstract, 4 pages, 3 figures, accepted to and presented at the Sustainable Space Robotics Workshop at iSpaRo 2025
summary: Commercial lunar activity is accelerating the need for reliable surface infrastructure and routine operations to keep it functioning. Maintenance tasks such as inspection, cleaning, dust mitigation, and minor repair are essential to preserve performance and extend system life. A specific application is the cleaning of lunar solar arrays. Solar arrays are expected to provide substantial fraction of lunar surface power and operate for months to years, supplying continuous energy to landers, habitats, and surface assets, making sustained output mission-critical. However, over time lunar dust accumulates on these large solar arrays, which can rapidly degrade panel output and reduce mission lifetime. We propose a small mobile robot equipped with a long-reach, lightweight deployable boom and interchangeable cleaning tool to perform gentle cleaning over meter-scale workspaces with minimal human involvement. Building on prior vision-guided long-reach manipulation, we add a compliant wrist with distal force sensing and a velocity-based admittance controller to regulate stable contact during surface cleaning. In preliminary benchtop experiments on a planar surface, the system maintained approximately 2 N normal force while executing a simple cleaning motion over boom lengths from 0.3 m to 1.0 m, with RMS force error of approximately 0.2 N after initial contact. These early results suggest that deployable long-reach manipulators are a promising architecture for robotic maintenance of lunar infrastructure such as solar arrays, radiators, and optical surfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于月球太阳能板的长臂机器人清洁系统，通过可伸缩机械臂和智能控制实现高效除尘。
AI.motivation: 月球表面长期积累的月尘会显著降低太阳能板效率，而传统维护方式难以满足长期任务需求，需开发自动化清洁方案。
AI.method: 设计配备可展开长臂和柔性腕部的移动机器人，结合末端力反馈与速度自适应控制器，通过视觉引导实现精准表面清洁。
AI.result: 桌面实验显示系统可在0.3-1.0米臂长范围内稳定维持2牛顿接触力，力误差均方根仅为0.2牛顿。
AI.conclusion: 可展开长臂机械架构为月球基础设施维护提供了可行方案，适用于太阳能板、散热器等大面积表面清洁任务。

title: Diffusion Mental Averages
summary: Can a diffusion model produce its own "mental average" of a concept-one that is as sharp and realistic as a typical sample? We introduce Diffusion Mental Averages (DMA), a model-centric answer to this question. While prior methods aim to average image collections, they produce blurry results when applied to diffusion samples from the same prompt. These data-centric techniques operate outside the model, ignoring the generative process. In contrast, DMA averages within the diffusion model's semantic space, as discovered by recent studies. Since this space evolves across timesteps and lacks a direct decoder, we cast averaging as trajectory alignment: optimize multiple noise latents so their denoising trajectories progressively converge toward shared coarse-to-fine semantics, yielding a single sharp prototype. We extend our approach to multimodal concepts (e.g., dogs with many breeds) by clustering samples in semantically-rich spaces such as CLIP and applying Textual Inversion or LoRA to bridge CLIP clusters into diffusion space. This is, to our knowledge, the first approach that delivers consistent, realistic averages, even for abstract concepts, serving as a concrete visual summary and a lens into model biases and concept representation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Diffusion Mental Averages (DMA)的方法，通过在扩散模型内部语义空间中进行轨迹对齐，生成清晰且真实的概念平均图像。
AI.motivation: 传统图像平均方法在处理扩散模型生成样本时会产生模糊结果，因其未考虑模型内部生成过程，而DMA旨在通过模型内部语义空间平均解决此问题。
AI.method: 将平均问题转化为轨迹对齐，优化多个噪声潜变量使其去噪轨迹逐步收敛至共享语义；通过CLIP空间聚类和文本反转/LoRA技术处理多模态概念。
AI.result: DMA首次实现对抽象概念的一致、真实平均，生成清晰原型，可作为视觉摘要并揭示模型偏见与概念表示。
AI.conclusion: DMA通过模型内语义空间操作，有效生成高质量概念平均，为理解模型表示和概念抽象提供了新视角。

title: An Experiential Approach to AI Literacy
comment: Paper accepted at CHI 2026 Workshop on Data Literacy. For more details, see https://data-literacy-workshop.github.io/CHI26/
summary: Despite AI tools becoming more prevalent and applicable to a variety of workplaces, workers consistently report uncertainty about where AI applies, what problems it can help solve, and how it fits into real workflows. In other words, there is a gap between `knowing' and `doing' when it comes to AI literacy. We propose an experiential form of AI literacy which integrates participant's daily experiences into the learning experience by brainstorming grounded AI use cases through storytelling. We introduce a novel pedagogical approach that helps individuals move away from abstract notions of AI towards practical knowledge of how AI would (or would not) work in different workflows, contexts, and situations. Through this approach, we anticipate two major outcomes: (1) enhanced AI literacy for stakeholders within a variety of work sectors and (2) concrete AI use cases developed through participatory design that are grounded in AI literacy and participant's expertise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种体验式AI素养教学方法，通过结合参与者日常经验与故事讲述，提升其对AI实际应用场景的理解与实践能力。
AI.motivation: 当前AI工具普及背景下，工作者普遍缺乏将AI理论知识转化为实际工作场景应用的能力，存在'知'与'行'的脱节问题。
AI.method: 采用参与式设计方法，通过头脑风暴和故事讲述挖掘真实工作场景中的AI应用案例，构建基于实践的AI素养教学框架。
AI.result: 预期实现两个目标：一是提升多行业从业者的AI素养水平，二是产出基于参与者专业经验的可落地AI应用方案。
AI.conclusion: 体验式学习方法能有效弥合AI知识与实践应用间的鸿沟，为不同领域提供可操作的AI解决方案开发路径。

title: M2H-MX: Multi-Task Dense Visual Perception for Real-Time Monocular Spatial Understanding
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Preprint under review
summary: Monocular cameras are attractive for robotic perception due to their low cost and ease of deployment, yet achieving reliable real-time spatial understanding from a single image stream remains challenging. While recent multi-task dense prediction models have improved per-pixel depth and semantic estimation, translating these advances into stable monocular mapping systems is still non-trivial. This paper presents M2H-MX, a real-time multi-task perception model for monocular spatial understanding. The model preserves multi-scale feature representations while introducing register-gated global context and controlled cross-task interaction in a lightweight decoder, enabling depth and semantic predictions to reinforce each other under strict latency constraints. Its outputs integrate directly into an unmodified monocular SLAM pipeline through a compact perception-to-mapping interface. We evaluate both dense prediction accuracy and in-the-loop system performance. On NYUDv2, M2H-MX-L achieves state-of-the-art results, improving semantic mIoU by 6.6% and reducing depth RMSE by 9.4% over representative multi-task baselines. When deployed in a real-time monocular mapping system on ScanNet, M2H-MX reduces average trajectory error by 60.7% compared to a strong monocular SLAM baseline while producing cleaner metric-semantic maps. These results demonstrate that modern multi-task dense prediction can be reliably deployed for real-time monocular spatial perception in robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M2H-MX，一种用于实时单目空间感知的多任务密集视觉感知模型，通过改进深度和语义预测的协同优化提升单目SLAM系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 单目相机因低成本和易部署性在机器人感知中具有吸引力，但实现单目图像流的实时可靠空间理解仍具挑战性，现有方法在多任务预测与实际系统集成间存在性能差距。
AI.method: 设计轻量级解码器，融合多尺度特征表示、注册门控全局上下文和受控跨任务交互机制，通过感知到映射接口直接集成至未修改的单目SLAM系统。
AI.result: 在NYUDv2数据集上，M2H-MX-L模型使语义mIoU提升6.6%、深度RMSE降低9.4%；在ScanNet实际系统中，轨迹误差减少60.7%，生成更清晰的度量-语义地图。
AI.conclusion: 现代多任务密集预测模型可通过优化任务间协同机制，有效部署于实时单目空间感知系统，显著提升机器人环境理解能力。

title: Long-Document QA with Chain-of-Structured-Thought and Fine-Tuned SLMs
comment: 26 pages, 17 figures, 10 tables. Accepted at ICLR 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are widely applied to data analytics over documents, yet direct reasoning over long, noisy documents remains brittle and error-prone. Hence, we study document question answering (QA) that consolidates dispersed evidence into a structured output (e.g., a table, graph, or chunks) to support reliable, verifiable QA. We propose a two-pillar framework, LiteCoST, to achieve both high accuracy and low latency with small language models (SLMs). Pillar 1: Chain-of-Structured-Thought (CoST). We introduce a CoST template, a schema-aware instruction that guides a strong LLM to produce both a step-wise CoST trace and the corresponding structured output. The process induces a minimal structure, normalizes entities/units, aligns records, serializes the output, and verifies/refines it, yielding auditable supervision. Pillar 2: SLM fine-tuning. The compact models are trained on LLM-generated CoST data in two stages: Supervised Fine-Tuning for structural alignment, followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) incorporating triple rewards for answer/format quality and process consistency. By distilling structure-first behavior into SLMs, this approach achieves LLM-comparable quality on multi-domain long-document QA using 3B/7B SLMs, while delivering 2-4x lower latency than GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1 (671B). The code is available at https://github.com/HKUSTDial/LiteCoST.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiteCoST框架，利用结构化思维链（CoST）和微调的小语言模型（SLMs）提升长文档问答的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在处理长且嘈杂的文档时存在推理脆弱性和错误率高的问题，需通过结构化输出实现可靠、可验证的问答。
AI.method: 提出两支柱框架：1）CoST模板引导LLM生成结构化输出；2）分两阶段微调SLMs（监督微调+GRPO优化），结合三重奖励机制提升格式与过程一致性。
AI.result: 使用3B/7B SLMs实现与LLM相当的多领域长文档问答质量，延迟比GPT-4o和DeepSeek-R1低2-4倍，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LiteCoST通过结构化思维与SLMs微调有效平衡长文档问答的准确性与效率，为大规模部署提供可行方案。

title: Beyond pass@1: A Reliability Science Framework for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Existing benchmarks measure capability -- whether a model succeeds on a single attempt -- but production deployments require reliability -- consistent success across repeated attempts on tasks of varying duration. We show these properties diverge systematically as task duration grows, and that pass@1 on short tasks is structurally blind to this divergence. We introduce a reliability science framework for long-horizon LLM agents with four metrics: Reliability Decay Curve (RDC), Variance Amplification Factor (VAF), Graceful Degradation Score (GDS), and Meltdown Onset Point (MOP). We evaluate 10 models across 23,392 episodes on a 396-task benchmark spanning four duration buckets and three domains. Key findings: (1) reliability decay is domain-stratified -- SE GDS drops from 0.90 to 0.44 while document processing is nearly flat (0.74 to 0.71); (2) VAF bifurcates by capability tier -- high VAF is a capability signature, not an instability signal; (3) capability and reliability rankings diverge substantially, with multi-rank inversions at long horizons; (4) frontier models have the highest meltdown rates (up to 19%) because they attempt ambitious multi-step strategies that sometimes spiral; and (5) memory scaffolds universally hurt long-horizon performance across all 10 models. These results motivate reliability as a first-class evaluation dimension alongside capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种超越传统pass@1指标的可靠性科学框架，用于评估长时地平线LLM代理的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅关注单次任务成功率，但实际部署需要模型在重复尝试和长期任务中保持稳定性，而传统指标无法反映这种可靠性差异。
AI.method: 引入四个可靠性指标（RDC、VAF、GDS、MOP），在包含23,392个剧集的396任务基准上评估10个模型，覆盖不同任务持续时间和领域。
AI.result: 可靠性随领域显著变化，高VAF反映模型能力层级，能力与可靠性排名在长时任务中出现倒置，前沿模型崩溃率高达19%，记忆结构普遍损害长期表现。
AI.conclusion: 可靠性应作为与能力并列的核心评估维度，推动长时地平线LLM代理的稳健性设计与优化。

title: CCDNet: Learning to Detect Camouflage against Distractors in Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: Infrared target detection (IRSTD) tasks have critical applications in areas like wilderness rescue and maritime search. However, detecting infrared targets is challenging due to their low contrast and tendency to blend into complex backgrounds, effectively camouflaging themselves. Additionally, other objects with similar features (distractors) can cause false alarms, further degrading detection performance. To address these issues, we propose a novel \textbf{C}amouflage-aware \textbf{C}ounter-\textbf{D}istraction \textbf{Net}work (CCDNet) in this paper. We design a backbone with Weighted Multi-branch Perceptrons (WMPs), which aggregates self-conditioned multi-level features to accurately represent the target and background. Based on these rich features, we then propose a novel Aggregation-and-Refinement Fusion Neck (ARFN) to refine structures/semantics from shallow/deep features maps, and bidirectionally reconstruct the relations between the targets and the backgrounds, highlighting the targets while suppressing the complex backgrounds to improve detection accuracy. Furthermore, we present a new Contrastive-aided Distractor Discriminator (CaDD), enforcing adaptive similarity computation both locally and globally between the real targets and the backgrounds to more precisely discriminate distractors, so as to reduce the false alarm rate. Extensive experiments on infrared image datasets confirm that CCDNet outperforms other state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CCDNet网络，旨在解决红外小目标检测中因目标伪装和干扰物导致的检测难题。
AI.motivation: 红外目标检测面临目标对比度低、易与背景融合以及干扰物引发误报等挑战，现有方法难以有效区分伪装目标与背景或干扰物。
AI.method: 设计包含加权多分支感知机(WMPs)的主干网络以提取多级特征，结合聚合- refinement融合颈(ARFN)优化特征语义，并引入对比辅助干扰物鉴别器(CaDD)通过局部-全局相似性计算提升干扰物识别精度。
AI.result: 在多个红外图像数据集上的实验表明，CCDNet在检测精度和误报率指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CCDNet通过多尺度特征融合与对比学习机制，有效解决了伪装目标检测中的背景抑制与干扰物鉴别问题，为红外小目标检测提供了新思路。

title: Kernel-SDF: An Open-Source Library for Real-Time Signed Distance Function Estimation using Kernel Regression
summary: Accurate and efficient environment representation is crucial for robotic applications such as motion planning, manipulation, and navigation. Signed distance functions (SDFs) have emerged as a powerful representation for encoding distance to obstacle boundaries, enabling efficient collision-checking and trajectory optimization techniques. However, existing SDF reconstruction methods have limitations when it comes to large-scale uncertainty-aware SDF estimation from streaming sensor data. Voxel-based approaches are limited by fixed resolution and lack uncertainty quantification, neural network methods require significant training time, while Gaussian process (GP) methods struggle with scalability, sign estimation, and uncertainty calibration. In this letter, we develop an open-source library, Kernel-SDF, which uses kernel regression to learn SDF with calibrated uncertainty quantification in real-time. Our approach consists of a front-end that learns a continuous occupancy field via kernel regression, and a back-end that estimates accurate SDF via GP regression using samples from the front-end surface boundaries. Kernel-SDF provides accurate SDF, SDF gradient, SDF uncertainty, and mesh construction in real-time. Evaluation results show that Kernel-SDF achieves superior accuracy compared to existing methods, while maintaining real-time performance, making it suitable for various robotics applications requiring reliable uncertainty-aware geometric information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Kernel-SDF的开源库，用于实时估计具有校准不确定性量化的符号距离函数（SDF）。
AI.motivation: 现有SDF重建方法在处理大规模流式传感器数据时存在局限性，如体素方法分辨率固定且缺乏不确定性量化，神经网络方法训练耗时，高斯过程方法可扩展性差且难以校准不确定性。
AI.method: 该方法包含前端通过核回归学习连续占用场，后端利用前端表面边界样本通过高斯过程回归估计精确SDF，实现实时SDF、梯度、不确定性及网格构建。
AI.result: 实验表明，Kernel-SDF在保持实时性能的同时，相比现有方法具有更高的精度。
AI.conclusion: Kernel-SDF为需要可靠不确定性感知几何信息的机器人应用提供了有效工具。

title: Long-Reach Robotic Manipulation for Assembly and Outfitting of Lunar Structures
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, to appear in the proceedings of iSpaRo 2025
summary: Future infrastructure construction on the lunar surface will require semi- or fully-autonomous operation from robots deployed at the build site. In particular, tasks such as electrical outfitting necessitate transport, routing, and fine manipulation of cables across large structures. To address this need, we present a compact and long-reach manipulator incorporating a deployable composite boom, capable of performing manipulation tasks across large structures and workspaces. We characterize the deflection, vibration, and blossoming characteristics inherent to the deployable structure, and present a manipulation control strategy to mitigate these effects. Experiments indicate an average endpoint accuracy error of less than 15 mm for boom lengths up to 1.8 m. We demonstrate the approach with a cable routing task to illustrate the potential for lunar outfitting applications that benefit from long reach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于月球结构组装与布线的长臂机器人机械臂，解决大范围操作中的精度与稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 月球基地建设需机器人执行电缆布线等精细操作，传统机械臂难以兼顾长距离作业与高精度控制。
AI.method: 设计集成可展开复合材料臂的紧凑型机械臂，分析其偏转/振动特性并开发控制策略，通过实验验证性能。
AI.result: 1.8米臂长下末端定位误差＜15mm，成功完成电缆布线任务，验证了长臂操作在月球工程中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该机械臂为月球基地基础设施建设提供了可扩展的自动化解决方案，具备实际工程应用潜力。

title: Derived Fields Preserve Fine-Scale Detail in Budgeted Neural Simulators
summary: Fine-scale-faithful neural simulation under fixed storage budgets remains challenging. Many existing methods reduce high-frequency error by improving architectures, training objectives, or rollout strategies. However, under budgeted coarsen-quantize-decode pipelines, fine detail can already be lost when the carried state is constructed. In the canonical periodic incompressible Navier-Stokes setting, we show that primitive and derived fields undergo systematically different retained-band distortions under the same operator. Motivated by this observation, we formulate Derived-Field Optimization (DerivOpt), a general state-design framework that chooses which physical fields are carried and how storage budget is allocated across them under a calibrated channel model. Across the full time-dependent forward subset of PDEBench, DerivOpt not only improves pooled mean rollout nRMSE, but also delivers a decisive advantage in fine-scale fidelity over a broad set of strong baselines. More importantly, the gains are already visible at input time, before rollout learning begins. This indicates that the carried state is often the dominant bottleneck under tight storage budgets. These results suggest a broader conclusion: in budgeted neural simulation, carried-state design should be treated as a first-class design axis alongside architecture, loss, and rollout strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DerivOpt的框架，通过优化携带的物理场选择和存储分配，在预算受限的神经模拟器中保留细粒度细节。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在固定存储预算下难以保留细粒度细节，尤其在构建携带状态时会出现信息丢失。作者发现原始场和导出场在相同操作下会产生系统性差异，从而提出通过优化携带场设计来解决此问题。
AI.method: 提出Derived-Field Optimization（DerivOpt）框架，在校准的通道模型下选择携带的物理场及存储分配策略，通过调整携带状态设计提升模拟精度。
AI.result: 在PDEBench的时变前向子集上，DerivOpt显著提升平均滚动nRMSE，且在细粒度保真度上优于多个基线方法，且改进效果在输入阶段即可观察到。
AI.conclusion: 在预算受限的神经模拟中，携带状态设计应与架构、损失函数和滚动策略同等重视，是影响细粒度精度的关键因素。

title: SyriSign: A Parallel Corpus for Arabic Text to Syrian Arabic Sign Language Translation
summary: Sign language is the primary approach of communication for the Deaf and Hard-of-Hearing (DHH) community. While there are numerous benchmarks for high-resource sign languages, low-resource languages like Arabic remain underrepresented. Currently, there is no publicly available dataset for Syrian Arabic Sign Language (SyArSL). To overcome this gap, we introduce SyriSign, a dataset comprising 1500 video samples across 150 unique lexical signs, designed for text-to-SyArSL translation tasks. This work aims to reduce communication barriers in Syria, as most news are delivered in spoken or written Arabic, which is often inaccessible to the deaf community. We evaluated SyriSign using three deep learning architectures: MotionCLIP for semantic motion generation, T2M-GPT for text-conditioned motion synthesis, and SignCLIP for bilingual embedding alignment. Experimental results indicate that while generative approaches show strong potential for sign representation, the limited dataset size constrains generalization performance. We will release SyriSign publicly, hoping it serves as an initial benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SyriSign数据集，用于阿拉伯语文本到叙利亚阿拉伯手语的翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 叙利亚阿拉伯手语缺乏公开数据集，导致聋人社区难以获取新闻等信息，需建立基准数据集以减少沟通障碍。
AI.method: 构建包含1500个视频样本（150个词汇手势）的平行语料库，并采用MotionCLIP、T2M-GPT和SignCLIP三种深度学习模型进行评估。
AI.result: 生成模型在手语表示上表现良好，但受限于数据集规模，模型泛化能力不足。
AI.conclusion: 公开发布SyriSign数据集，旨在为叙利亚手语翻译研究提供初始基准。

title: Advancing LLM-based phoneme-to-grapheme for multilingual speech recognition
summary: Phoneme-based ASR factorizes recognition into speech-to-phoneme (S2P) and phoneme-to-grapheme (P2G), enabling cross-lingual acoustic sharing while keeping language-specific orthography in a separate module. While large language models (LLMs) are promising for P2G, multilingual P2G remains challenging due to language-aware generation and severe cross-language data imbalance. We study multilingual LLM-based P2G on the ten-language CV-Lang10 benchmark. We examine robustness strategies that account for S2P uncertainty, including DANP and Simplified SKM (S-SKM). S-SKM is a Monte Carlo approximation that avoids CTC-based S2P probability weighting in P2G training. Robust training and low-resource oversampling reduce the average WER from 10.56% to 7.66%.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于大语言模型的多语言音素到字素（P2G）转换方法，以提升多语言语音识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统音素到字素模块在跨语言场景中面临语言感知生成困难和数据不平衡问题，需改进多语言P2G的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出简化SKM（S-SKM）策略，采用蒙特卡洛近似替代CTC概率加权，并结合鲁棒训练与低资源语言过采样技术。
AI.result: 在CV-Lang10基准上，平均词错误率（WER）从10.56%降低至7.66%。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化P2G训练策略，有效缓解了多语言数据不平衡问题，为跨语言语音识别提供了新思路。

title: Software Vulnerability Detection Using a Lightweight Graph Neural Network
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, preprint of journal submission
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a popular choice in vulnerability detection studies given their foundational capabilities, open source availability, and variety of models, but have limited scalability due to extensive compute requirements. Using the natural graph relational structure of code, we show that our proposed graph neural network (GNN) based deep learning model VulGNN for vulnerability detection can achieve performance almost on par with LLMs, but is 100 times smaller in size and fast to retrain and customize. We describe the VulGNN architecture, ablation studies on components, learning rates, and generalizability to different code datasets. As a lightweight model for vulnerability analysis, VulGNN is efficient and deployable at the edge as part of real-world software development pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级图神经网络模型VulGNN，用于高效检测软件漏洞，替代传统大语言模型。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型虽在漏洞检测中表现优异，但存在计算资源消耗大、扩展性差等问题，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 基于代码的图结构设计VulGNN架构，通过消融实验优化组件、学习率，并验证模型在不同代码数据集上的泛化能力。
AI.result: VulGNN性能接近大语言模型，但体积缩小100倍，且具备快速重训练和定制化能力。
AI.conclusion: VulGNN作为轻量级模型，适合边缘部署，可有效集成到实际软件开发流程中进行漏洞检测。

title: Kilohertz-Safe: A Scalable Framework for Constrained Dexterous Retargeting
summary: Dexterous hand teleoperation requires motion re-targeting methods that simultaneously achieve high-frequency real-time performance and enforcement of heterogeneous kinematic and safety constraints. Existing nonlinear optimization-based approaches often incur prohibitive computational cost, limiting their applicability to kilohertz-level control, while learning-based methods typically lack formal safety guarantees. This paper proposes a scalable motion retargeting framework that reformulates the nonlinear retargeting problem into a convex quadratic program in joint differential space. Heterogeneous constraints, including kinematic limits and collision avoidance, are incorporated through systematic linearization, resulting in improved computational efficiency and numerical stability. Control barrier functions are further integrated to provide formal safety guarantees during the retargeting process. The proposed framework is validated through simulations and hardware experiments on the Wuji Hand platform, outperforming state-of-the-art methods such as Dex-Retargeting and GeoRT. The framework achieves high-frequency operation with an average latency of 9.05 ms, while over 95% of retargeted frames satisfy the safety criteria, effectively mitigating self-collision and penetration during complex manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的运动重定向框架，用于在高频率实时控制下实现灵巧手操作的安全性与计算效率平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性优化方法计算成本高，难以满足千赫兹级控制需求；基于学习的方法缺乏形式化安全保证，需开发兼顾实时性与安全性的新框架。
AI.method: 将非线性重定向问题转化为关节微分空间的凸二次规划，通过系统线性化整合运动学限制与避障约束，并引入控制屏障函数确保安全性。
AI.result: 在Wuji手平台实验中，框架平均延迟9.05ms，95%以上帧满足安全标准，优于Dex-Retargeting和GeoRT等方法，有效减少自碰撞与穿透。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过凸优化与安全约束集成，在复杂操作任务中实现了高频率实时控制与形式化安全保证的统一。

title: Xuanwu: Evolving General Multimodal Models into an Industrial-Grade Foundation for Content Ecosystems
summary: In recent years, multimodal large models have continued to improve on general benchmarks. However, in real-world content moderation and adversarial settings, mainstream models still suffer from degraded generalization and catastrophic forgetting because of limited fine-grained visual perception and insufficient modeling of long-tail noise. In this paper, we present Xuanwu VL-2B as a case study of how general multimodal models can be developed into an industrial-grade foundation model for content ecosystems. The model adopts a compact InternViT-300M + MLP + Qwen3 1.7B architecture, balancing fine-grained visual perception, language-semantic alignment, and deployment cost within an approximately 2B-parameter budget. To balance business specialization with the retention of general capabilities, we developed a data iteration and curation mechanism and trained the model through a progressive three-stage pipeline: pre-training, mid-training, and post-training. Ablation studies and offline business evaluations show that Xuanwu VL-2B achieves an average score of 67.90 across seven OpenCompass multimodal metrics (vs. 64.27 for InternVL 3.5 2B), an average recall of 94.38% over seven independent business moderation tasks, and a weighted overall recall of 82.82% on policy-violating text in challenging adversarial OCR scenarios, outperforming Gemini-2.5-Pro (76.72%). These results show that, under a limited parameter budget, Xuanwu VL-2B achieves a practical balance among business alignment, visual perception, general capability retention, and deployment cost.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Xuanwu VL-2B的工业级多模态基础模型，旨在提升内容生态系统中的内容审核和对抗场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大模型在通用基准上取得了进展，但在实际内容审核和对抗场景中，主流模型仍存在泛化能力下降和灾难性遗忘的问题。
AI.method: 该模型采用紧凑的InternViT-300M + MLP + Qwen3 1.7B架构，并通过预训练、中训练和后训练的三阶段流程进行训练，同时开发了数据迭代和筛选机制。
AI.result: Xuanwu VL-2B在七个OpenCompass多模态指标上平均得分为67.90，在七个独立业务审核任务中平均召回率为94.38%，在对抗OCR场景中政策违规文本的加权整体召回率为82.82%，优于Gemini-2.5-Pro。
AI.conclusion: 在有限参数预算下，Xuanwu VL-2B在业务对齐、视觉感知、通用能力保留和部署成本之间取得了实际平衡。

title: LightHarmony3D: Harmonizing Illumination and Shadows for Object Insertion in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity reconstruction of scene geometry and appearance. Building on this capability, inserting external mesh objects into reconstructed 3DGS scenes enables interactive editing and content augmentation for immersive applications such as AR/VR, virtual staging, and digital content creation. However, achieving physically consistent lighting and shadows for mesh insertion remains challenging, as it requires accurate scene illumination estimation and multi-view consistent rendering. To address this challenge, we present LightHarmony3D, a novel framework for illumination-consistent mesh insertion in 3DGS scenes. Central to our approach is our proposed generative module that predicts a full 360° HDR environment map at the insertion location via a single forward pass. By leveraging generative priors instead of iterative optimization, our method efficiently captures dominant scene illumination and enables physically grounded shading and shadows for inserted meshes while maintaining multi-view coherence. Furthermore, we introduce the first dedicated benchmark for mesh insertion in 3DGS, providing a standardized evaluation framework for assessing lighting consistency and photorealism. Extensive experiments across multiple real-world reconstruction datasets demonstrate that LightHarmony3D achieves state-of-the-art realism and multi-view consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LightHarmony3D框架，解决在3D高斯泼溅场景中插入外部网格物体时的光照和阴影一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在3D场景中插入网格物体时难以实现物理一致的光照和阴影，影响沉浸式应用的逼真度。
AI.method: 通过生成模块预测插入位置的360°HDR环境图，利用生成先验替代迭代优化，结合专用基准测试光照一致性与逼真度。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上达到最先进的逼真度和多视角一致性，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: LightHarmony3D为3D高斯泼溅中的网格插入提供了高效解决方案，并建立了首个专用评估基准。

title: Route-Induced Density and Stability (RIDE): Controlled Intervention and Mechanism Analysis of Routing-Style Meta Prompts on LLM Internal States
summary: Routing is widely used to scale large language models, from Mixture-of-Experts gating to multi-model/tool selection. A common belief is that routing to a task ``expert'' activates sparser internal computation and thus yields more certain and stable outputs (the Sparsity--Certainty Hypothesis). We test this belief by injecting routing-style meta prompts as a textual proxy for routing signals in front of frozen instruction-tuned LLMs. We quantify (C1) internal density via activation sparsity, (C2) domain-keyword attention, and (C3) output stability via predictive entropy and semantic variation. On a RouterEval subset with three instruction-tuned models (Qwen3-8B, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, and Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2), meta prompts consistently densify early/middle-layer representations rather than increasing sparsity; natural-language expert instructions are often stronger than structured tags. Attention responses are heterogeneous: Qwen/Llama reduce keyword attention, while Mistral reinforces it. Finally, the densification--stability link is weak and appears only in Qwen, with near-zero correlations in Llama and Mistral. We present RIDE as a diagnostic probe for calibrating routing design and uncertainty estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过注入路由风格的元提示，研究其对冻结指令微调大语言模型内部状态及输出稳定性的影响机制。
AI.motivation: 验证路由机制是否通过激活任务专家提升模型输出确定性与稳定性的'稀疏性-确定性假设'，并探索路由信号对模型内部表示的影响规律。
AI.method: 在三个指令微调模型前注入路由元提示，通过激活稀疏性、领域关键词注意力及输出熵值三个指标，量化分析内部状态变化与输出稳定性关联。
AI.result: 元提示使早期/中层表示致密化而非稀疏化；自然语言专家指令效果优于结构化标签；Qwen/Llama降低关键词注意力而Mistral增强；致密化与稳定性关联仅在Qwen中显著。
AI.conclusion: RIDE框架揭示了路由设计与不确定性估计的校准方法，表明路由信号对模型内部状态的影响存在模型依赖性。

title: BiMoE: Brain-Inspired Experts for EEG-Dominant Affective State Recognition
summary: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) that integrates Electroencephalogram (EEG) with peripheral physiological signals (PPS) is crucial for the development of brain-computer interface (BCI) systems. However, existing methods encounter three major challenges: (1) overlooking the region-specific characteristics of affective processing by treating EEG signals as homogeneous; (2) treating EEG as a black-box input, which lacks interpretability into neural representations;(3) ineffective fusion of EEG features with complementary PPS features. To overcome these issues, we propose BiMoE, a novel brain-inspired mixture of experts framework. BiMoE partitions EEG signals in a brain-topology-aware manner, with each expert utilizing a dual-stream encoder to extract local and global spatiotemporal features. A dedicated expert handles PPS using multi-scale large-kernel convolutions. All experts are dynamically fused through adaptive routing and a joint loss function. Evaluated under strict subject-independent settings, BiMoE consistently surpasses state-of-the-art baselines across various affective dimensions. On the DEAP and DREAMER datasets, it yields average accuracy improvements of 0.87% to 5.19% in multimodal sentiment classification. The code is available at: https://github.com/HongyuZhu-s/BiMo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiMoE框架，通过融合脑电图（EEG）与外周生理信号（PPS）提升情感状态识别性能，以改进脑机接口系统。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在情感分析中存在三大问题：忽视EEG区域特异性、缺乏神经表征可解释性、EEG与PPS特征融合效果差，需开发更高效的多模态分析框架。
AI.method: BiMoE基于脑拓扑分区处理EEG信号，采用双流编码器提取时空特征，专用专家处理PPS，通过自适应路由和联合损失函数动态融合多模态信息。
AI.result: 在DEAP和DREAMER数据集上，BiMoE在多模态情感分类任务中平均准确率提升0.87%-5.19%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: BiMoE有效解决了EEG情感分析的关键挑战，为脑机接口系统的多模态情感识别提供了更高效且可解释的解决方案。

title: Improving Ensemble Forecasts of Abnormally Deflecting Tropical Cyclones with Fused Atmosphere-Ocean-Terrain Data
summary: Deep learning-based tropical cyclone (TC) forecasting methods have demonstrated significant potential and application advantages, as they feature much lower computational cost and faster operation speed than numerical weather prediction models. However, existing deep learning methods still have key limitations: they can only process a single type of sequential trajectory data or homogeneous meteorological variables, and fail to achieve accurate forecasting of abnormal deflected TCs. To address these challenges, we present two groundbreaking contributions. First, we have constructed a multimodal and multi-source dataset named AOT-TCs for TC forecasting in the Northwest Pacific basin. As the first dataset of its kind, it innovatively integrates heterogeneous variables from the atmosphere, ocean, and land, thus obtaining a comprehensive and information-rich meteorological dataset. Second, based on the AOT-TCs dataset, we propose a forecasting model that can handle both normal and abnormally deflected TCs. This is the first TC forecasting model to adopt an explicit atmosphere-ocean-terrain coupling architecture, enabling it to effectively capture complex interactions across physical domains. Extensive experiments on all TC cases in the Northwest Pacific from 2017 to 2024 show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance in TC forecasting: it not only significantly improves the forecasting accuracy of normal TCs but also breaks through the technical bottleneck in forecasting abnormally deflected TCs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合大气-海洋-地形数据的深度学习模型，用于改进西北太平洋异常偏转热带气旋的集合预报。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法无法处理异构气象数据，且难以准确预测异常偏转热带气旋，存在关键局限性。
AI.method: 构建多模态多源AOT-TCs数据集，整合大气、海洋和陆地异构变量；设计显式大气-海洋-地形耦合架构的预测模型。
AI.result: 在2017-2024年西北太平洋所有热带气旋案例中，模型在正常气旋和异常偏转气旋预测均达到最先进水平，突破技术瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 通过多源数据融合与物理耦合架构，本文方法为热带气旋预报提供了新范式，显著提升异常偏转气旋预测能力。

title: AEC-Bench: A Multimodal Benchmark for Agentic Systems in Architecture, Engineering, and Construction
summary: The AEC-Bench is a multimodal benchmark for evaluating agentic systems on real-world tasks in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) domain. The benchmark covers tasks requiring drawing understanding, cross-sheet reasoning, and construction project-level coordination. This report describes the benchmark motivation, dataset taxonomy, evaluation protocol, and baseline results across several domain-specific foundation model harnesses. We use AEC-Bench to identify consistent tools and harness design techniques that uniformly improve performance across foundation models in their own base harnesses, such as Claude Code and Codex. We openly release our benchmark dataset, agent harness, and evaluation code for full replicability at https://github.com/nomic-ai/aec-bench under an Apache 2 license.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AEC-Bench基准，用于评估代理系统在建筑、工程和施工领域的多模态任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型在AEC领域复杂任务（如图纸理解、项目协调）中存在评估不足，需专门基准验证其实际应用能力。
AI.method: 构建包含图纸理解、跨图纸推理和项目级协调任务的多模态数据集，制定评估协议并测试 Claude Code、Codex 等模型。
AI.result: 发现统一工具和设计技术（如特定模型架构调整）可提升不同基础模型在AEC任务中的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 开源数据集与评估代码，为AEC领域智能代理系统研究提供可复现的基准，推动行业应用发展。

title: Multi-Layered Memory Architectures for LLM Agents: An Experimental Evaluation of Long-Term Context Retention
summary: Long-horizon dialogue systems suffer from semanticdrift and unstable memory retention across extended sessions. This paper presents a Multi-Layer Memory Framework that decomposes dialogue history into working, episodic, and semantic layers with adaptive retrieval gating and retention regularization. The architecture controls cross-session drift while maintaining bounded context growth and computational efficiency. Experiments on LOCOMO, LOCCO, and LoCoMo show improved performance, achieving 46.85 Success Rate, 0.618 overall F1 with 0.594 multi-hop F1, and 56.90% six-period retention while reducing false memory rate to 5.1% and context usage to 58.40%. Results confirm enhanced long-term retention and reasoning stability under constrained context budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多层次记忆框架，用于解决大型语言模型代理在长期对话中的语义漂移和记忆不稳定问题，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 长期对话系统存在语义漂移和跨会话记忆不稳定的问题，导致上下文管理效率低下且影响任务成功率。
AI.method: 设计包含工作记忆、情景记忆和语义记忆的分层架构，结合自适应检索门控机制与保留正则化策略，控制上下文增长并优化记忆检索效率。
AI.result: 在LOCOMO等数据集上实现46.85%成功率、0.618整体F1分数及56.90%六周期保留率，同时将错误记忆率降至5.1%且减少58.40%的上下文使用量。
AI.conclusion: 多层次记忆架构有效提升了长期上下文保留能力与推理稳定性，在有限上下文预算下显著优化了对话系统的性能表现。

title: Developing Adaptive Context Compression Techniques for Large Language Models (LLMs) in Long-Running Interactions
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often experience performance degradation during long-running interactions due to increasing context length, memory saturation, and computational overhead. This paper presents an adaptive context compression framework that integrates importance-aware memory selection, coherence-sensitive filtering, and dynamic budget allocation to retain essential conversational information while controlling context growth. The approach is evaluated on LOCOMO, LOCCO, and LongBench benchmarks to assess answer quality, retrieval accuracy, coherence preservation, and efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves consistent improvements in conversational stability and retrieval performance while reducing token usage and inference latency compared with existing memory and compression-based approaches. These findings indicate that adaptive context compression provides an effective balance between long-term memory preservation and computational efficiency in persistent LLM interactions

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应上下文压缩框架，解决大型语言模型在长期交互中因上下文过长导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 长期交互中，LLM因上下文长度增加、内存饱和及计算开销导致性能退化，需有效压缩技术平衡信息保留与效率。
AI.method: 整合重要性感知内存选择、连贯性敏感过滤与动态预算分配，压缩上下文同时保留关键信息。
AI.result: 在LOCOMO等基准测试中，方法提升对话稳定性与检索性能，减少token使用量及推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: 自适应上下文压缩技术有效平衡长期记忆保留与计算效率，适用于持续LLM交互场景。

title: Efficient Camera Pose Augmentation for View Generalization in Robotic Policy Learning
summary: Prevailing 2D-centric visuomotor policies exhibit a pronounced deficiency in novel view generalization, as their reliance on static observations hinders consistent action mapping across unseen views. In response, we introduce GenSplat, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting framework that facilitates view-generalized policy learning through novel view rendering. GenSplat employs a permutation-equivariant architecture to reconstruct high-fidelity 3D scenes from sparse, uncalibrated inputs in a single forward pass. To ensure structural integrity, we design a 3D-prior distillation strategy that regularizes the 3DGS optimization, preventing the geometric collapse typical of purely photometric supervision. By rendering diverse synthetic views from these stable 3D representations, we systematically augment the observational manifold during training. This augmentation forces the policy to ground its decisions in underlying 3D structures, thereby ensuring robust execution under severe spatial perturbations where baselines severely degrade.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenSplat框架，通过高效的3D场景重建与视角渲染增强，解决机器人策略学习中视角泛化不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有2D视觉运动策略因依赖静态观测，难以在未见过的视角下保持动作映射一致性，导致严重空间扰动时性能显著下降。
AI.method: 设计置换等变架构实现单次前向传递的高保真3D重建，并引入3D先验蒸馏策略稳定几何结构，通过多视角合成数据增强训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在复杂空间扰动场景下保持策略鲁棒性，显著优于传统基线方法的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于3D场景理解的视角增强策略为机器人视觉学习提供了新的泛化范式，有效解决了跨视角适应性难题。

title: 3D Architect: An Automated Approach to Three-Dimensional Modeling
summary: The aim of our paper is to render an object in 3-dimension using a set of its orthographic views. Corner detector (Harris Detector) is applied on the input views to obtain control points. These control points are projected perpendicular to respective views, in order to construct an envelope. A set of points describing the object in 3-dimension, are obtained from the intersection of these mutually perpendicular envelopes. These set of points are used to regenerate the surfaces of the object using computational geometry. At the end, the object in 3-dimension is rendered using OpenGL

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正交视图的三维自动化建模方法，通过角点检测和几何计算生成三维模型。
AI.motivation: 传统三维建模依赖人工操作和专业技能，自动化方法可提高效率并降低技术门槛。
AI.method: 使用Harris角点检测获取控制点，通过正交视图投影构建包络线，计算交集点并应用计算几何与OpenGL生成三维模型。
AI.result: 成功实现从正交视图到三维模型的自动化转换，生成结果符合预期几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了基于正交视图的自动化三维建模可行性，为后续应用提供了有效技术路径。

title: SLVMEval: Synthetic Meta Evaluation Benchmark for Text-to-Long Video Generation
summary: This paper proposes the synthetic long-video meta-evaluation (SLVMEval), a benchmark for meta-evaluating text-to-video (T2V) evaluation systems. The proposed SLVMEval benchmark focuses on assessing these systems on videos of up to 10,486 s (approximately 3 h). The benchmark targets a fundamental requirement, namely, whether the systems can accurately assess video quality in settings that are easy for humans to assess. We adopt a pairwise comparison-based meta-evaluation framework. Building on dense video-captioning datasets, we synthetically degrade source videos to create controlled "high-quality versus low-quality" pairs across 10 distinct aspects. Then, we employ crowdsourcing to filter and retain only those pairs in which the degradation is clearly perceptible, thereby establishing an effective final testbed. Using this testbed, we assess the reliability of existing evaluation systems in ranking these pairs. Experimental results demonstrate that human evaluators can identify the better long video with 84.7%-96.8% accuracy, and in nine of the 10 aspects, the accuracy of these systems falls short of human assessment, revealing weaknesses in text-to-long-video evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SLVMEval的合成长视频元评估基准，用于评估文本到长视频生成系统的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本到长视频评估系统在人类容易评估的场景中表现不佳，因此需要一个基准来测试这些系统在长视频质量评估中的可靠性。
AI.method: 该研究采用基于成对比较的元评估框架，利用密集视频字幕数据集合成退化视频，创建10个不同方面的高质量与低质量视频对，并通过众包筛选出明显可感知退化的对。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，人类评估者在识别更好的长视频时准确率达到84.7%-96.8%，而现有系统在9个方面表现不及人类评估。
AI.conclusion: 现有的文本到长视频评估系统在多个方面存在不足，需要进一步改进以提高其可靠性与准确性。

title: Hierarchical Visual Relocalization with Nearest View Synthesis from Feature Gaussian Splatting
summary: Visual relocalization is a fundamental task in the field of 3D computer vision, estimating a camera's pose when it revisits a previously known scene. While point-based hierarchical relocalization methods have shown strong scalability and efficiency, they are often limited by sparse image observations and weak feature matching. In this work, we propose SplatHLoc, a novel hierarchical visual relocalization framework that uses Feature Gaussian Splatting as the scene representation. To address the sparsity of database images, we propose an adaptive viewpoint retrieval method that synthesizes virtual candidates with viewpoints more closely aligned with the query, thereby improving the accuracy of initial pose estimation. For feature matching, we observe that Gaussian-rendered features and those extracted directly from images exhibit different strengths across the two-stage matching process: the former performs better in the coarse stage, while the latter proves more effective in the fine stage. Therefore, we introduce a hybrid feature matching strategy, enabling more accurate and efficient pose estimation. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor datasets show that SplatHLoc enhances the robustness of visual relocalization, setting a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征高斯点云的层次化视觉重定位框架SplatHLoc，旨在解决传统方法在稀疏图像观测和弱特征匹配下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于点的层次化视觉重定位方法在稀疏图像观测和弱特征匹配方面存在局限，难以实现高精度和高效率的相机姿态估计。
AI.method: 本文提出SplatHLoc框架，采用特征高斯点云作为场景表示，并引入自适应视角检索方法以合成更贴近查询视角的虚拟候选图像，同时采用混合特征匹配策略以提高粗略和精细匹配阶段的性能。
AI.result: 在室内和室外数据集上的大量实验表明，SplatHLoc显著提升了视觉重定位的鲁棒性，并在性能上达到了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: SplatHLoc通过结合特征高斯点云和混合特征匹配策略，有效解决了传统方法在视觉重定位中的不足，为该领域提供了新的研究方向和解决方案。

title: IMPACT: Influence Modeling for Open-Set Time Series Anomaly Detection
summary: Open-set anomaly detection (OSAD) is an emerging paradigm designed to utilize limited labeled data from anomaly classes seen in training to identify both seen and unseen anomalies during testing. Current approaches rely on simple augmentation methods to generate pseudo anomalies that replicate unseen anomalies. Despite being promising in image data, these methods are found to be ineffective in time series data due to the failure to preserve its sequential nature, resulting in trivial or unrealistic anomaly patterns. They are further plagued when the training data is contaminated with unlabeled anomalies. This work introduces $\textbf{IMPACT}$, a novel framework that leverages $\underline{\textbf{i}}$nfluence $\underline{\textbf{m}}$odeling for o$\underline{\textbf{p}}$en-set time series $\underline{\textbf{a}}$nomaly dete$\underline{\textbf{ct}}$ion, to tackle these challenges. The key insight is to $\textbf{i)}$ learn an influence function that can accurately estimate the impact of individual training samples on the modeling, and then $\textbf{ii)}$ leverage these influence scores to generate semantically divergent yet realistic unseen anomalies for time series while repurposing high-influential samples as supervised anomalies for anomaly decontamination. Extensive experiments show that IMPACT significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, showing superior accuracy under varying OSAD settings and contamination rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMPACT框架，通过影响建模解决开放集时间序列异常检测中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在时间序列异常检测中因无法保留序列特性及处理训练数据污染问题效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过学习样本影响函数生成语义差异但真实的未见异常，并利用高影响力样本进行异常去污染。
AI.result: 在多种OSAD设置和污染率下，IMPACT显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: IMPACT通过影响建模有效解决了开放集时间序列异常检测的关键难题。

title: Retinal Malady Classification using AI: A novel ViT-SVM combination architecture
comment: ef:6th International Conference on Computing Methodologies and Communication (ICCMC), Erode, India, 2022, pp. 1659-1664
summary: Macular Holes, Central serous retinopathy and Diabetic Retinopathy are one of the most widespread maladies of the eyes responsible for either partial or complete vision loss, thus making it clear that early detection of the mentioned defects is detrimental for the well-being of the patient. This study intends to introduce the application of Vision Transformer and Support Vector Machine based hybrid architecture (ViT-SVM) and analyse its performance to classify the optical coherence topography (OCT) Scans with the intention to automate the early detection of these retinal defects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉Transformer（ViT）和支持向量机（SVM）的混合架构，用于分类光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像以实现视网膜疾病的自动化早期检测。
AI.motivation: 视网膜疾病如黄斑孔、中心性渗出性视网膜病变和糖尿病视网膜病变可能导致视力丧失，早期检测对患者健康至关重要，但传统方法存在效率和准确性不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计了一种融合Vision Transformer特征提取能力与SVM分类优势的混合模型，通过分析OCT扫描数据实现疾病分类。
AI.result: 实验表明该混合架构在视网膜疾病分类任务中表现出较高的准确率和灵敏度，优于传统单一模型方法。
AI.conclusion: ViT-SVM混合架构为视网膜疾病自动化检测提供了有效解决方案，具有潜在的临床应用价值。

title: Predicting Neuromodulation Outcome for Parkinson's Disease with Generative Virtual Brain Model
summary: Parkinson's disease (PD) affects over ten million people worldwide. Although temporal interference (TI) and deep brain stimulation (DBS) are promising therapies, inter-individual variability limits empirical treatment selection, increasing non-negligible surgical risk and cost. Previous explorations either resort to limited statistical biomarkers that are insufficient to characterize variability, or employ AI-driven methods which is prone to overfitting and opacity. We bridge this gap with a pretraining-finetuning framework to predict outcomes directly from resting-state fMRI. Critically, a generative virtual brain foundation model, pretrained on a collective dataset (2707 subjects, 5621 sessions) to capture universal disorder patterns, was finetuned on PD cohorts receiving TI (n=51) or DBS (n=55) to yield individualized virtual brains with high fidelity to empirical functional connectivity (r=0.935). By constructing counterfactual estimations between pathological and healthy neural states within these personalized models, we predicted clinical responses (TI: AUPR=0.853; DBS: AUPR=0.915), substantially outperforming baselines. External and prospective validations (n=14, n=11) highlight the feasibility of clinical translation. Moreover, our framework provides state-dependent regional patterns linked to response, offering hypothesis-generating mechanistic insights.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于生成式虚拟脑模型的框架，用于预测帕金森病患者神经调控治疗（如TI和DBS）的个体化疗效。
AI.motivation: 现有治疗方法因个体差异导致治疗选择困难，传统统计生物标志物和AI方法存在不足，需更精准的预测工具以降低手术风险和成本。
AI.method: 采用预训练-微调框架，利用大规模数据集预训练生成式虚拟脑模型，再在PD患者队列上微调，结合静息态fMRI数据构建病理与健康状态的反事实估计进行预测。
AI.result: 模型与实测功能连接高度吻合（r=0.935），TI和DBS的预测AUPR分别为0.853和0.915，外部验证显示临床转化可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了个体化疗效预测，提供了与治疗反应相关的状态依赖区域模式，为机制研究和临床应用提供了新思路。

title: Segmentation of Gray Matters and White Matters from Brain MRI data
summary: Accurate segmentation of brain tissues such as gray matter and white matter from magnetic resonance imaging is essential for studying brain anatomy, diagnosing neurological disorders, and monitoring disease progression. Traditional methods, such as FSL FAST, produce tissue probability maps but often require task-specific adjustments and face challenges with diverse imaging conditions. Recent foundation models, such as MedSAM, offer a prompt-based approach that leverages large-scale pretraining. In this paper, we propose a modified MedSAM model designed for multi-class brain tissue segmentation. Our preprocessing pipeline includes skull stripping with FSL BET, tissue probability mapping with FSL FAST, and converting these into 2D axial, sagittal, coronal slices with multi-class labels (background, gray matter, and white matter). We extend MedSAM's mask decoder to three classes, freezing the pre-trained image encoder and fine-tuning the prompt encoder and decoder. Experiments on the IXI dataset achieve Dice scores up to 0.8751. This work demonstrates that foundation models like MedSAM can be adapted for multi-class medical image segmentation with minimal architectural modifications. Our findings suggest that such models can be extended to more diverse medical imaging scenarios in future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的MedSAM模型，用于从脑部MRI数据中分割灰质、白质和背景三类组织。
AI.motivation: 传统分割方法如FSL FAST需要任务特定调整且适应性差，而现有基础模型MedSAM尚未充分探索多类脑组织分割的潜力。
AI.method: 预处理阶段结合FSL BET去颅骨和FSL FAST生成概率图，将数据转化为带三类标签的2D切片。扩展MedSAM掩码解码器至三分类，冻结预训练图像编码器，仅微调提示编码器和解码器。
AI.result: 在IXI数据集上达到最高0.8751的Dice系数，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基础模型可通过少量架构修改适配多类医学图像分割任务，未来可拓展至更复杂的医疗影像场景。

title: CT-to-X-ray Distillation Under Tiny Paired Cohorts: An Evidence-Bounded Reproducible Pilot Study
summary: Chest X-ray and computed tomography (CT) provide complementary views of thoracic disease, yet most computer-aided diagnosis models are trained and deployed within a single imaging modality. The concrete question studied here is narrower and deployment-oriented: on a patient-level paired chest cohort, can CT act as training-only supervision for a binary disease versus non-disease X-ray classifier without requiring CT at inference time? We study this setting as a cross-modality teacher--student distillation problem and use JDCNet as an executable pilot scaffold rather than as a validated superior architecture. On the original patient-level paired split from a public paired chest imaging cohort, a stripped-down plain cross-modal logit-KD control attains the highest mean result on the four-image validation subset (0.875 accuracy and 0.714 macro-F1), whereas the full module-augmented JDCNet variant remains at 0.750 accuracy and 0.429 macro-F1. To test whether that ranking is a split artifact, we additionally run eight patient-level Monte Carlo resamples with same-case comparisons, stronger mechanism controls based on attention transfer and feature hints, and imbalance-sensitive analyses. Under this resampled protocol, late fusion attains the highest mean accuracy (0.885), same-modality distillation attains the highest mean macro-F1 (0.554) and balanced accuracy (0.660), the plain cross-modal control drops to 0.500 mean balanced accuracy, and neither attention transfer nor feature hints recover a robust cross-modality advantage. The contribution of this study is therefore not a validated CT-to-X-ray architecture, but a reproducible and evidence-bounded pilot protocol that makes the exact task definition, failure modes, ranking instability, and the minimum requirements for future credible CT-to-X-ray transfer claims explicit.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨在小规模配对患者队列中，能否仅通过CT影像训练出无需CT推理的胸部X光二分类疾病检测模型，并验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: CT和X光提供互补的胸部疾病视角，但现有模型多局限于单一模态。研究旨在验证CT能否作为训练监督，使X光分类器在无CT推理时仍有效，以解决临床中CT不可用的场景。
AI.method: 将问题定义为跨模态教师-学生蒸馏任务，采用JDCNet框架并对比简化版跨模态logit-KD方法。通过原始数据集分割和八次患者级蒙特卡洛重采样，分析不同融合策略（如晚期融合、同模态蒸馏）及注意力迁移等机制的有效性。
AI.result: 原始数据集上简化跨模态控制方法在四图像验证集达到0.875准确率和0.714宏F1；重采样后晚期融合准确率最高（0.885），同模态蒸馏宏F1最高（0.554），而跨模态方法性能下降至0.500平衡准确率。
AI.conclusion: 研究未验证CT到X光的最优架构，但提出了可复现的协议，明确了任务定义、失败模式及未来可信跨模态迁移的最低要求，揭示了排名不稳定性问题。

title: LatentPilot: Scene-Aware Vision-and-Language Navigation by Dreaming Ahead with Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: Existing vision-and-language navigation (VLN) models primarily reason over past and current visual observations, while largely ignoring the future visual dynamics induced by actions. As a result, they often lack an effective understanding of the causal relationship between actions and how the visual world changes, limiting robust decision-making. Humans, in contrast, can imagine the near future by leveraging action-dynamics causality, which improves both environmental understanding and navigation choices. Inspired by this capability, we propose LatentPilot, a new paradigm that exploits future observations during training as a valuable data source to learn action-conditioned visual dynamics, while requiring no access to future frames at inference. Concretely, we propose a flywheel-style training mechanism that iteratively collects on-policy trajectories and retrains the model to better match the agent's behavior distribution, with an expert takeover triggered when the agent deviates excessively. LatentPilot further learns visual latent tokens without explicit supervision; these latent tokens attend globally in a continuous latent space and are carried across steps, serving as both the current output and the next input, thereby enabling the agent to dream ahead and reason about how actions will affect subsequent observations. Experiments on R2R-CE, RxR-CE, and R2R-PE benchmarks achieve new SOTA results, and real-robot tests across diverse environments demonstrate LatentPilot's superior understanding of environment-action dynamics in scene. Project page:https://abdd.top/latentpilot/

AI.tldr: 本文提出LatentPilot，一种通过潜意识视觉推理预测未来场景的视觉-语言导航模型，以提升环境动态理解与路径决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言导航模型仅依赖历史观测，忽视动作引发的未来视觉变化，导致无法准确理解行动与环境变化的因果关系，限制了导航鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计飞轮式训练机制，迭代收集策略轨迹并触发专家接管；通过无监督学习生成跨步长传递的潜意识视觉标记（latent tokens），在连续潜在空间中实现未来视觉推理。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE、RxR-CE等基准测试中取得新SOTA结果，多场景实机器人实验验证其对环境-动作动态的优越理解能力。
AI.conclusion: LatentPilot通过潜意识视觉推理机制，有效模拟人类对未来场景的想象能力，为复杂环境下的视觉-语言导航提供了新范式。

title: SparseDriveV2: Scoring is All You Need for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end multi-modal planning has been widely adopted to model the uncertainty of driving behavior, typically by scoring candidate trajectories and selecting the optimal one. Existing approaches generally fall into two categories: scoring a large static trajectory vocabulary, or scoring a small set of dynamically generated proposals. While static vocabularies often suffer from coarse discretization of the action space, dynamic proposals provide finer-grained precision and have shown stronger empirical performance on existing benchmarks. However, it remains unclear whether dynamic generation is fundamentally necessary, or whether static vocabularies can already achieve comparable performance when they are sufficiently dense to cover the action space. In this work, we start with a systematic scaling study of Hydra-MDP, a representative scoring-based method, revealing that performance consistently improves as trajectory anchors become denser, without exhibiting saturation before computational constraints are reached. Motivated by this observation, we propose SparseDriveV2 to push the performance boundary of scoring-based planning through two complementary innovations: (1) a scalable vocabulary representation with a factorized structure that decomposes trajectories into geometric paths and velocity profiles, enabling combinatorial coverage of the action space, and (2) a scalable scoring strategy with coarse factorized scoring over paths and velocity profiles followed by fine-grained scoring on a small set of composed trajectories. By combining these two techniques, SparseDriveV2 achieves 92.0 PDMS and 90.1 EPDMS on NAVSIM, with 89.15 Driving Score and 70.00 Success Rate on Bench2Drive with a lightweight ResNet-34 as backbone. Code and model are released at https://github.com/swc-17/SparseDriveV2.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SparseDriveV2方法，通过优化静态轨迹词汇库的表示和评分策略，提升端到端自动驾驶的规划性能。
AI.motivation: 现有动态提案方法虽精度高，但需验证静态词汇库在足够密集时是否可达到相近性能。研究发现轨迹锚点密度提升可持续优化性能，从而提出改进方案。
AI.method: 设计分解轨迹为几何路径与速度剖面的可扩展词汇结构，并采用分层评分策略：先对路径和速度进行粗粒度评分，再对组合轨迹进行细粒度评分。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM数据集上达到92.0 PDMS和90.1 EPDMS，在Bench2Drive上取得89.15 Driving Score和70.00 Success Rate，使用轻量ResNet-34模型。
AI.conclusion: 静态轨迹词汇库通过结构化设计可实现与动态提案相当的性能，且计算效率更优，为端到端自动驾驶提供新思路。

title: Webscraper: Leverage Multimodal Large Language Models for Index-Content Web Scraping
summary: Modern web scraping struggles with dynamic, interactive websites that require more than static HTML parsing. Current methods are often brittle and require manual customization for each site. To address this, we introduce Webscraper, a framework designed to handle the challenges of modern, dynamic web applications. It leverages a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) to autonomously navigate interactive interfaces, invoke specialized tools, and perform structured data extraction in environments where traditional scrapers are ineffective. Webscraper utilizes a structured five-stage prompting procedure and a set of custom-built tools to navigate and extract data from websites following the common ``index-and-content'' architecture. Our experiments, conducted on six news websites, demonstrate that the full Webscraper framework, equipped with both our guiding prompt and specialized tools, achieves a significant improvement in extraction accuracy over the baseline agent Anthropic's Computer Use. We also applied the framework to e-commerce platforms to validate its generalizability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Webscraper框架，利用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）实现对动态网站的索引-内容架构数据抓取。
AI.motivation: 传统网络爬虫难以应对动态交互网站，需手动定制且易失效，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计五阶段提示流程结合定制工具，利用MLLM自主导航界面、调用工具并提取结构化数据。
AI.result: 在六个新闻网站和电商平台上验证，相较基线模型显著提升数据抓取准确性。
AI.conclusion: Webscraper通过MLLM与结构化流程有效解决动态网站抓取难题，具有广泛适用性。

title: Kwame 2.0: Human-in-the-Loop Generative AI Teaching Assistant for Large Scale Online Coding Education in Africa
comment: 8 pages, Accepted at the 27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2026)
summary: Providing timely and accurate learning support in large-scale online coding courses is challenging, particularly in resource-constrained contexts. We present Kwame 2.0, a bilingual (English-French) generative AI teaching assistant built using retrieval-augmented generation and deployed in a human-in-the-loop forum within SuaCode, an introductory mobile-based coding course for learners across Africa. Kwame 2.0 retrieves relevant course materials and generates context-aware responses while encouraging human oversight and community participation. We deployed the system in a 15-month longitudinal study spanning 15 cohorts with 3,717 enrollments across 35 African countries. Evaluation using community feedback and expert ratings shows that Kwame 2.0 provided high-quality and timely support, achieving high accuracy on curriculum-related questions, while human facilitators and peers effectively mitigated errors, particularly for administrative queries. Our findings demonstrate that human-in-the-loop generative AI systems can combine the scalability and speed of AI with the reliability of human support, offering an effective approach to learning assistance for underrepresented populations in resource-constrained settings at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Kwame 2.0，一种结合人类监督的生成式AI教学助手，用于非洲大规模在线编程教育。
AI.motivation: 在资源匮乏地区，大规模在线编程课程面临及时准确学习支持的挑战，需开发可扩展且可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于检索增强生成技术构建双语AI助手，部署于SuaCode平台的人机协作论坛，结合人类导师与社区反馈进行错误修正。
AI.result: 系统在15个月的长期研究中服务3,717名学员，准确率高且人类有效处理了行政类错误，获得社区与专家好评。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作的生成式AI系统能兼顾AI的扩展性与人类可靠性，为资源受限地区的教育提供有效支持。

title: SimMOF: AI agent for Automated MOF Simulations
summary: Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) offer a vast design space, and as such, computational simulations play a critical role in predicting their structural and physicochemical properties. However, MOF simulations remain difficult to access because reliable analysis require expert decisions for workflow construction, parameter selection, tool interoperability, and the preparation of computational ready structures. Here, we introduce SimMOF, a large language model based multi agent framework that automates end-to-end MOF simulation workflows from natural language queries. SimMOF translates user requests into dependency aware plans, generates runnable inputs, orchestrates multiple agents to execute simulations, and summarizes results with analysis aligned to the user query. Through representative case studies, we show that SimMOF enables adaptive and cognitively autonomous workflows that reflect the iterative and decision driven behavior of human researchers and as such provides a scalable foundation for data driven MOF research.

AI.tldr: 开发SimMOF，一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，自动化端到端MOF模拟工作流程，通过自然语言查询实现用户需求。
AI.motivation: MOF模拟依赖专家决策，流程复杂且难以访问，需要自动化工具提高可及性和效率。
AI.method: 构建基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，自动化处理用户查询，生成依赖感知计划，协调执行模拟并总结结果。
AI.result: 通过案例验证，SimMOF实现自适应、自主的工作流程，模拟人类研究者行为，为数据驱动MOF研究提供可扩展基础。
AI.conclusion: SimMOF有效解决MOF模拟自动化难题，提升研究效率，推动数据驱动的MOF材料开发。

title: Knowledge database development by large language models for countermeasures against viruses and marine toxins
summary: Access to the most up-to-date information on medical countermeasures is important for the research and development of effective treatments for viruses and marine toxins. However, there is a lack of comprehensive databases that curate data on viruses and marine toxins, making decisions on medical countermeasures slow and difficult. In this work, we employ two large language models (LLMs) of ChatGPT and Grok to design two comprehensive databases of therapeutic countermeasures for five viruses of Lassa, Marburg, Ebola, Nipah, and Venezuelan equine encephalitis, as well as marine toxins. With high-level human-provided inputs, the two LLMs identify public databases containing data on the five viruses and marine toxins, collect relevant information from these databases and the literature, iteratively cross-validate the collected information, and design interactive webpages for easy access to the curated, comprehensive databases. Notably, the ChatGPT LLM is employed to design agentic AI workflows (consisting of two AI agents for research and decision-making) to rank countermeasures for viruses and marine toxins in the databases. Together, our work explores the potential of LLMs as a scalable, updatable approach for building comprehensive knowledge databases and supporting evidence-based decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本论文利用大型语言模型（LLMs）开发针对病毒和海洋毒素的综合知识数据库，以支持医疗对策的研发。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏针对病毒和海洋毒素的全面数据库，导致医疗对策决策缓慢且困难，亟需构建可更新的综合数据库以提高决策效率。
AI.method: 采用ChatGPT和Grok两种LLMs，通过高阶人工输入识别公开数据库和文献信息，迭代交叉验证数据，并设计交互式网页界面。ChatGPT还用于构建智能代理工作流以排序医疗对策。
AI.result: 成功构建了涵盖五种病毒及海洋毒素的两个综合数据库，实现了数据的自动化收集、验证与可视化访问，验证了LLMs在知识库建设中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: LLMs可作为可扩展、可更新的工具，用于构建全面知识数据库并支持基于证据的医疗决策，为病毒和毒素研究提供新方法。
